name: Egg Wars
description: Protect the egg in your own area from damage and win the game by damaging the opposite egg. Knock down your opponent in one move using cannon launchers. With the money you earn, buy cannons and make more bullet ammunition. Enjoy!
instructions: Keyboard P1 W A S D P1 Attack S P2 Arrow Key P2 Attack Down Arrow Key Mobile P1 On-screen red arrow keys P2 On-screen blue arrow keys
tags: 2 Player, 2D, Action, Adventure, Android, Animal, Arcade, Arena, Bird, Defense, Gun, Pixel, Sword, Tower Defense
